sglang.title: support tokenized batch request
sglang.author: narutolhy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The previous PR #9436 only supported batched requests when the inputs were provided as text.
This PR adds support for batched requests when all inputs are input_ids, so the execution path is consistent with the text input case and avoids unnecessary per-request overhead.

Modifications

sglang.title: [logprobs] Enable local deterministic logrprobs testing with strict threshold
sglang.author: PrinsYin
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Numerical logprobs are highly sensitive to GPU type, kernel backend, PyTorch version, and even kernel launch order. This makes CI-based validation unreliable and noisy.
This PR introduces a local, developer-run logprobs test that ensures:

bitwise consistency of logprobs under determinist

Summary
This PR fixes the CI Monitor workflow and improves its summary report.
Changes

Changed ${{ github.event.inputs.limit || '1000' }} to ${{ inputs.limit || '1000' }} in workflow
Problem: After manual runs, scheduled runs weren't using the default limit (1000), caus

sglang.title: Fix version bump script to handle TOML files with outdated versions
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The script previously failed to update pyproject_xpu.toml and pyproject_cpu.toml because it used simple string replacement that only worked when files contained the exact current version.
This ensures all platform-specific pyproject files stay synchronized regardless of their current version state.

sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Modifications


Use CCACHE to store all build results on runner local path
Add profiles for both CMake and Ninja
Add a setup script for new CPU runners that would just execute the build actions
Add time spent on each build action

sglang.title: check  master server for mooncake store
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When deploying Mooncake Store online, the startup order of Mooncake Store master and sglang may not be guaranteed. Therefore, a check server is added. When Mooncake Store Master has not yet been fully started successfully, sglang waits for the master for 10 minutes to prevent rapid failur

vllm.title: [LoRA] LoRA cuda graph specialization
vllm.author: andylolu2
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

Currently when enabling LoRA (with cuda graphs, which is necessary for reasonable speed) adds overhead to the normal inference path, even if there are no active LoRA adapters. This is because we currently only capture cuda graphs with LoRA operations included.
